# PERF-135 positive: gob.NewEncoder inside a loop
lang: go
file: PERF-135-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/gob"
	"net"
)

func Send(items []int, conn net.Conn) error {
	for _, it := range items {
		enc := gob.NewEncoder(conn)
		if err := enc.Encode(it); err != nil {
			return err
		}
	}
	return nil
}
